Four reference-only definitions (Data Infrastructure & Methodology, Outcome Tracking and both cross-cutting tags) combine the frozen definition with imported authoritative inclusion/exclusion boundary clauses, with exact source fields, paths and text. Canonical labels, frozen taxonomy definitions, inclusion/exclusion and cardinality rules, production classifications, visibility coding, branching, requiredness and analytical completion are unchanged. The four combined reference definitions are explicitly traced as frozen definitions plus imported boundary clauses and are not described as verbatim frozen wording; the other 18 were verified against their cited definition after whitespace normalisation.

pilot_or_formal_data_effect: No real participant data, sample, assignment, response or REDCap connection was created. Candidate 0.2 and frozen sources remain unchanged.
